old_google_model: Which page can rank for this keyword and which listing can appear nearby?
transition_model: Which page is useful, original, local, and supported by reliable signals?
today_model: Which entity and page can be retrieved, trusted, summarized, cited, and acted on?
roofing_action: Build pages around homeowner decisions, not just keyword strings.

old_google_model: Best and top phrases were often treated as exact-match page targets.
transition_model: Semantic systems made these phrases comparison intent rather than only literal page-title targets.
today_model: Best/top queries should route into proof-led evaluation content, review evidence, local trust modules, and transparent criteria.
roofing_action: Keep best and top in the study as homeowner language, but frame them as query evidence that must be backed by proof.

old_google_model: Exact-match titles and many keyword/city variants.
transition_model: Semantic grouping, intent matching, and stronger content quality.
today_model: Query clusters connected to trust evidence, service intent, local proof, and structured facts.
roofing_action: Use one hub for best/top/trusted and add unique city trust modules where proof exists.

old_google_model: Enough text to index and rank.
transition_model: Original, useful, people-first content becomes central.
today_model: Content should contain substantial original analysis, clear sourcing, proof, and expert context.
roofing_action: Show inspection workflow, repair/replacement logic, storm documentation standards, photos, and actual review themes.

old_google_model: More links and citations were often treated as the main authority signal.
transition_model: Spam-resistant link quality and brand/entity corroboration matter more.
today_model: Legitimate citations, profiles, press, datasets, DOI records, and source trails support entity confidence.
roofing_action: Use GitHub, Hugging Face, Zenodo, press, profiles, and website pages as a coherent source spine.

old_google_model: Map pack visibility, citations, address/phone consistency, and proximity.
transition_model: Google Business Profile completeness, reviews, photos, replies, and prominence.
today_model: Local identity must agree across GBP, website, reviews, service areas, schema, city pages, and source material.
roofing_action: Repair redirecting city pages and make GBP/profile facts match the dataset and website.

transition_model: Useful clarity layer for entity, service, FAQ, review, and dataset relationships.
today_model: A machine-readable entity graph helps reduce ambiguity across pages, profiles, data, and whitepaper assets.
roofing_action: Use RoofingContractor, Service, Dataset, CreativeWork, FAQPage where visible and true.

transition_model: Featured snippets and passage understanding increased the value of direct answers.
today_model: AI features use Search-rooted retrieval, RAG, and query fan-out to synthesize answers from sources.
roofing_action: Publish answer-ready evidence that can be quoted, summarized, and verified without exaggeration.

old_google_model: Doorway pages and keyword stuffing could appear tempting.
transition_model: Panda/Penguin/helpful-content systems raised the cost of thin or manipulative tactics.
today_model: Scaled content made to manipulate rankings or generative AI responses is explicitly risky.
roofing_action: Do not mass-produce 36 best-roofer pages. Use the dataset as a research map, not a doorway generator.

old_google_model: Users commonly evaluated a list of organic links, local results, ads, and snippets.
transition_model: SERPs added richer features, vertical results, featured snippets, and direct-answer surfaces.
today_model: AI Overviews, AI Mode, intelligent search boxes, and agentic search can answer or mediate more of the task before a click.
roofing_action: Make city/service pages answer-ready and source-linked so the business can be understood even when fewer users click through first.

old_google_model: Association came from ranking pages for a city keyword.
transition_model: Association expanded through profiles, citations, press, reviews, and structured pages.
today_model: Association can be built through a citable source trail: website pages, GitHub, Hugging Face, Zenodo, press references, and city-specific proof.
roofing_action: Publish the 36-city map as transparent research and link it to the AI visibility press study and GitHub repository.
